cards.marketing: bg-white rounded-[2rem] p-8 lg:p-10 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E5E1D8]/60
cards.admin: bg-white rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-[#E5E1D8]

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A2B4C] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#263B66] transition-colors shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8F0EB] text-[#2C5545] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#D4E2D8] transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#D96C4A] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#C25D3E] transition-colors shadow-md

intent_chips.style: inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#2C5545]/20 text-[#1A2B4C] rounded-full px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold shadow-sm

Home.purpose: Smart landing page reacting to user intent
sections: Dynamic Hero: Changes background image and copy based on selected Intent (Dog, Cat, Critter)
Intent Selector: 3 large clickable pet cards that set the global intent context
Featured Care Grid: Bento layout showing top services, dynamically reordered based on intent
Trust/Testimonials: Photos of actual clinic, the veterinarian, and patient stories
Team: Carousel or Grid featuring the veterinarian and care team
Contact & Footer: Embedded maps, hours, address, phone
List/Grid of Conditions: Dental, Vaccinations, PRP, Laser, Regenerative Med, Surgery
FAQ Surface: Accordions covering common pet owner questions
Dynamic Pre-form Copy: Echoes the intent back ('Ready to schedule a visit for your dog?')
Form Fields: Pet name, Species, Owner name, Contact, Reason for visit
Submit Button: Routes data to Admin Leads

Admin_Dashboard.purpose: Manage dynamic content and track leads
Admin_Dashboard.style: Crisp SaaS Control Panel - Clean, denser layout, functional
sections: Overview Stats: Lead count, Top intents (Dogs vs Cats)
Leads Table: Shows submissions, and 'Signal Timeline' (user intent trail)
Surfaces CRUD: Manage dynamic sections of the site
Switches CRUD: Rules that trigger content swapping

content_requirements.hours: Mon 8-4, Tue closed, Wed 12-7, Thu 8-4, Fri 8-3, Sat 9-1, Sun closed
content_requirements.address: 123 Main Street Suite 100 Your City ST 00000

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a hybrid_fullstack app using FastAPI, React, Tailwind, and Shadcn (JS, not TSX). Apply the 'Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy' design theme with generously rounded corners (rounded-[2rem]) and high-padding (p-8/p-12) to match the warm, pet-friendly Dribbble aesthetic. Typography uses Cabinet Grotesk for bold headings and Manrope for body text. Crucially, implement the 'Smart Site' intent architecture: Use React state or Context to track 'currentIntent' (Dogs, Cats, Other Critters). The Hero Section and Featured Services grid must reactively re-render content based on this state. Create a floating or fixed 'Intent Chip' indicating the current context (e.g., 'Showing for: Dogs'). Leave an empty placeholder div/component for the external chat widget. The admin dashboard route (/admin) should diverge from the soft marketing look into a denser, functional SaaS UI to manage dynamic 'Surfaces' and 'Switches' via basic CRUD, plus viewing leads. DO NOT use raw placeholders for images; map exactly to the provided `media` object URLs. All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="intent-selector-dog"`).
